metadata.title: David Melara | Executive Portfolio - Healthcare Commercial Operations

identity.name: David Melara
identity.headline: Healthcare Commercial and Clinical Operations Integration Lead

profile.summary: Executive with experience at the intersection of healthcare commercial strategy, professional account management and operational coordination. Specialized in integrating client-facing, technical and service functions to sustain continuity, protect critical revenue and reduce execution friction in clinically driven environments.

page1Experience.role: Senior Key Account and Clinical Operations Integration Lead
page1Experience.description: Managed critical dental accounts and resolved friction between doctors, technical production and service continuity. Protected high-value relationships and intervened on operational bottlenecks affecting delivery reliability, rework and revenue stability.
Built and sustained professional healthcare relationships through technical communication, territory consolidation and disciplined commercial execution in pharmaceutical markets.
Developed market presence and professional engagement in ethically regulated medical product lines, sustaining territory performance through technical precision and field consistency.

page2Experience.description: Led competitiveness and market intelligence initiatives with transferable strategic value for health-related commercial environments.

jobs.role: Senior Lecturer — Strategic Marketing and Negotiation
jobs.description: Delivered executive education in negotiation, consumer psychology and market intelligence, enriching applied judgment in professional service environments.

jobs.role: Head of Sales Operations / Strategic Manager
jobs.description: Reoriented commercial processes toward consultative selling and strategic account prioritization.
